column1: # Audio-library reference matrix manifest (tab-separated). One row per (lib, version, source tree).
# tools/build_audio_refs.sh expands each row over the compiler x opt matrix
#   compilers: kmc ido53 ido71   (override: COMPILERS="kmc ido53")
#   opt levels: O1 O2 O3          (override: OPTS="O2")
# producing one coddog reference object per cell at build/audio-ref/<lib>_<ver>_<compiler>_<opt>/.
# Columns:  lib  ver  srcdir  defines  incdirs
#   lib      libmus | libnaudio | nuaulstl   (the pick_target upstream key)
#   ver      short label, unique within lib   (e.g. n64sdkmod, sdk40v312)
#   srcdir   dir whose top-level *.c are the TUs (~ ok); nested .inc.c are #included, not compiled
#   incdirs  extra comma-separated -I dirs (~ ok), or "none"  (srcdir, srcdir/.., srcdir/../include
#            and the project include set are always added)
